top_stories.title: US to raise tariffs on EU cars to 25%, says Trump
top_stories.summary: WASHINGTON, United States – President Donald Trump said Friday that he will hike US tariffs on cars and trucks from the European Union next week, charging that the bloc is not complying with an earlier trade deal. top_stories.title: EV, solar loans emerge as bright spots for banks
top_stories.summary: Electric vehicle and solar financing are emerging as unexpected growth drivers for major Philippine banks as elevated oil prices and geopolitical tensions push households and businesses to seek cheaper and cleaner energy alternatives.
